title: Godot full port + Unity archive (gated)
description: Engine migration milestones. Oracle until M6: Unity demo-vertical-slice + PLAYABLE_SLICE/DEMO_RUN. Each milestone exits with godot_gut and/or godot_manual proof. Do not physically archive KyndeBlade_Unity until M6 sign-off—see .tdad/prompts/godot-archive-unity-snapshot.md.

nodes.title: M1 Foundation
nodes.description: Exit: Godot project layout, autoloads, input, scene flow menu→hub→combat; STEAM_BUILD.md QA checklist passes. Proof: manual + KyndeBlade_Godot runnable.

nodes.title: M2 Combat parity core
nodes.description: Exit: Encounter data as Resource; deterministic defensive windows; scripted False-class encounter win/lose. Proof: tests/run_headless_tests.gd combat section + manual strike loop. Maps TDAD combat-core/actions/defense concepts incrementally.

nodes.title: M3 Save menu pause settings
nodes.description: Exit: Continue/New, save keys documented vs Unity in STEAM_BUILD parity table; pause freezes window. Proof: godot-parity-slice nodes + headless save roundtrip.

nodes.title: M4 Map and narrative slice path
nodes.description: Exit: tour→fayre_felde path in data (Resource/JSON); story beat before combat; victory returns to hub with location. Proof: manual PLAYABLE_SLICE-aligned run + parity node coverage.

nodes.title: M5 Post-slice systems
nodes.description: Exit: Kynde/break/hazards/AI mapped from Unity TDAD folders to Godot milestones with behavior-subset tests (not line parity). Proof: per-subsystem checklist in milestone prompt expansion.

nodes.title: M6 Cutover archive Unity
nodes.description: Exit: godot-parity-slice green + exported Godot build signed off vs DEMO_RUN equivalent. Actions: run godot-archive-unity-snapshot prompt; move KyndeBlade_Unity to ProjectArchive/UnityKyndeBlade/; update root README; TDAD notes Godot as live oracle. Human-gated only.
